query: SELECT ls.id, ls.user_id, ls.display_name, ls.total_solved, ls.total_correct, ls.accuracy, ls.rating, ls.updated_at FROM leaderboard_scores ls ORDER BY ls.total_solved DESC LIMIT 20;
